formDescription: Step 3 - Technical Information - Government and First Nation Fee Exemption Request

IsEligibleForFeeExemption.title: Do you belong to, are you applying on behalf of, or are you an eligible government or First Nation entity for fee exemption?
IsEligibleForFeeExemption.description: if applying on behalf of  OR part of a provincial government ministry OR applying for the Government of Canada OR A First Nation for water use on reserve land OR A person applying to use water on Treaty Lands OR A Nisga'a citizen OR An entity applying to use water from the Nisga'a Water Reservation

IsExistingExemptClient.title: Are you an existing exempt client?
IsExistingExemptClient.description: Check whether if this is an existing client

FeeExemptionClientNumber.title: Please enter your client number:
FeeExemptionClientNumber.description: Client Number of the  existing client

enum: First Nations/Indian Band for use on Reserve
Acting on behalf of a BC provincial ministry with a letter of permission from that ministry
FeeExemptionCategory.title: Fee Exemption Category:
FeeExemptionCategory.description: Fee exempt category as per the applicant's situation -  First nation or BC Government ministry or Federal Government or Indian band

FeeExemptionSupportingInfo.title: Supporting Information
FeeExemptionSupportingInfo.description: Please enter any supporting information that will assist in determining your eligibility for a fee exemption. Please refer to help for details on fee exemption criteria and requirements.
